Interzenex MicrofinanceBack to home

API

Integrate Interzenex Microfinance into your applications with our developer-friendly REST API.

REST API

Our REST API allows you to embed Interzenex Microfinance payments, account management, and currency conversion into your own products. All endpoints return JSON and use standard HTTP verbs.

Base URL: https://api.interzenexmicrofinance.online/v1

Authentication

All API requests must include a Bearer token in the Authorization header. Generate API keys from your admin dashboard under Settings → API Keys.

Rate Limits

The API supports up to 1,000 requests per minute per key on the Business plan. Standard and Personal plans are limited to 100 requests per minute.

Webhooks

Subscribe to real-time transaction events. We POST a signed payload to your endpoint within 500ms of any account activity.

Full documentation and API reference available for Business customers. Contact support@interzenexmicrofinance.online to request API access.
